package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for rwmutex_without_clear_read_heavy_signal: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: sync.RWMutex usage without a clear read-heavy access pattern.
type CaseRwmutexWithoutClearReadHeavySignalDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRwmutexWithoutClearReadHeavySignalModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRwmutexWithoutClearReadHeavySignalRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRwmutexWithoutClearReadHeavySignalModel
}

type CaseRwmutexWithoutClearReadHeavySignalService struct {
    repo *CaseRwmutexWithoutClearReadHeavySignalRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRwmutexWithoutClearReadHeavySignalAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRwmutexWithoutClearReadHeavySignal(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRwmutexWithoutClearReadHeavySignalDTO) error {
    focus := "rwmutex_without_clear_read_heavy"
    _ = focus
    out := map[string]int{}
    var mu sync.Mutex
    var wg sync.WaitGroup
    mu.Lock(); time.Sleep(time.Millisecond); mu.Unlock()
    var rw sync.RWMutex
    rw.Lock(); _ = rw; rw.Unlock()
    wg.Wait()
    _ = out
    rwmutex_clear_read_heavy_signal_positive := map[string]int{"rwmutex": 1, "clear": 2, "read": 3, "heavy": 4, "signal": 5}
    rwmutex_clear_read_heavy_signal_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    rwmutex_positive_0 := rwmutex_clear_read_heavy_signal_positive["rwmutex"] + len(input)
    _ = rwmutex_positive_0
    clear_positive_1 := rwmutex_clear_read_heavy_signal_positive["clear"] + len(input)
    _ = clear_positive_1
    read_positive_2 := rwmutex_clear_read_heavy_signal_positive["read"] + len(input)
    _ = read_positive_2
    heavy_positive_3 := rwmutex_clear_read_heavy_signal_positive["heavy"] + len(input)
    _ = heavy_positive_3
    signal_positive_4 := rwmutex_clear_read_heavy_signal_positive["signal"] + len(input)
    _ = signal_positive_4
    return nil
}
